Frequently Asked Question

Ask More
Are your products cruelty-free?

Yes, all of our products are 100% cruelty-free and never tested on animals. We are committed to ethical beauty standards.

How do I find my perfect foundation shade?

Use our virtual try-on tool or consult our shade matching guide to find the perfect undertone for your specific skin type.

Are these products suitable for sensitive skin?

Absolutely. Our products are formulated without harsh chemicals, parabens, or synthetic fragrances, making them gentle enough for the most sensitive skin.

What is your return policy?

We offer a 30-day satisfaction guarantee. If you are not completely satisfied, you can return lightly used products for a full refund or exchange.
